blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,665 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
